1_instruction_adherence.rationale: All sections executed: scoring worksheet with 5 dimensions, evidence citations, threshold enforcement, improvement suggestions with P0/P1/P2 priorities.

2_output_completeness.rationale: Complete worksheet: 5 dimensions with sub-items, evidence citations, rationale. Threshold verification. Deduction details. Improvement suggestions. All present.

3_scoring_rigor.rationale: Each deduction has concrete fix suggestion with file+paragraph+change. P0/P1/P2 prioritization. Some suggestions remain vague ('补充至少1个主要配角的独立角色档案' lacks specific paragraphs).

4_threshold_enforcement.rationale: Both thresholds unconditionally enforced: total 85 >= 80 PASS, core conflict 27 >= 18 PASS.铁律检查 section explicitly verifies both. Non-negotiable logic.

5_evidence_based_evaluation.rationale: Score items cite specific evidence from truth fixtures. However, the review evaluates only truth fixtures (锈泥巷/银盾 version) — does not acknowledge that multi-chapter (矿区/灵晶) version has different content that would produce different scores.

6_actionability.rationale: Fixes point to specific files and fields with priority levels and expected score improvements. WARNING items are more observational than prescriptive. P0/P1 items are actionable.

7_dimension_balance.rationale: 5 dimensions scored independently: Core Conflict 27/30, Opening 17/20, World 17/20, Character 16/20, Foreshadowing 8/10. Sub-scores sum to 85 = reported total. Internally consistent scoring.

notes: Solid foundation review with rigorous threshold enforcement. Gap: evaluates only truth fixtures (锈泥巷 version), doesn't acknowledge multi-chapter (矿区) version's different content which would affect scores. Evidence citations are correct for the version evaluated but scope is version-limited.
